paper.title: Thermal expansion coefficient and dielectric properties of non-stoichiometric cordierite compositions with excess MgO mole ratio synthesized from mainly kaolin and talc by the glass crystallization method
paper.authors: Johar Banjuraizah, Hasmaliza Mohamad, Zainal Arifin Ahmad

cordierite_ceramic.property: 介电常数 ε' (1 MHz-1.8 GHz)
介电损耗 tan δ (1 MHz-1.8 GHz)

cordierite_ceramic.value: 滑石+高岭土→1500°C熔融→淬冷→900°C析晶，无烧结助剂
MgO>2.8时镁橄榄石(forsterite)作为次生相出现，α-堇青石含量下降

q3_reliability.notes: Journal of Alloys and Compounds (SCI Q1)。7种MgO配比(2.0-4.0)梯度实验+Rietveld定量相组成。玻璃析晶法不同于PAPER-002的固相烧结法。原料为滑石+高岭土，无烧结助剂。
